/shelf/

The shelf

Every book in the register — 2,165 in all — as a spine on the shelf it belongs to. Colour marks the collection; the darker the spine, the stronger the evidence. Hover for the call number, click to open the record. Or browse the register as a list.

EvidenceDirect markingInferred — name matchInferred — contextPossible
Western European collection1322 volumes
Lithuanian / Baltic430 volumes
Inferred provenance288 volumes
Library of Congress exchange29 volumes
Card-catalog only91 volumes
Rare manuscripts5 volumes
Provenance research & text: Bruce Nielsen · Penn Libraries, Katz Center for Advanced Judaic StudiesUncertainty in this record is shown, not hidden.
